title: rubus × platyanthus
intro: Rubus × platyanthus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the American black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant is rich in anthocyanins, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × platyanthus include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support cognitive function. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
